notes.en: [[character:kaedehara-kazuha]]'s 4th ascension passive provides an **elemental DMG bonus buff depending on his [[stat:em]]**, putting the main focus on his build on stacking [[stat:em]] while also having enough [[stat:er]] to [[ability:burst]] every rotation, as his [[ability:burst]] extends the duration of his passive and deals respectable damage through [[element:swirl]]s.
notes.fr: Le passif de 4e ascension de [[character:kaedehara-kazuha]] fournit **un buff de bonus de DGT élémentaires selon sa [[stat:em]]**, mettant l'accent principal de son build sur le fait de stack la [[stat:em]] tout en ayant assez de [[stat:er]] pour utiliser son [[ability:burst]] à chaque rotation, car son [[ability:burst]] prolonge la durée de son passif et inflige des dégâts respectables via les [[element:swirl]].
notes.it: Il Talento A4 di [[character:kaedehara-kazuha]] fornisce **un potenziamento di DAN Bonus Elementale basato sulla sua [[stat:em]]**; l'obiettivo della sua build è quindi quello di accumulare [[stat:em]] ed al contempo avere [[stat:er]] sufficiente ad utilizzare il [[ability:burst]] ad ogni rotazione, affinché il suo [[ability:burst]] possa estendere la durata del suo potenziamento ed infliggere danni rispettabili tramite [[element:swirl]].
notes.ru: Пассивный талант [[character:kaedehara-kazuha|Кадзухи]] (открывающийся на 4-м возвышении) склоняет игроков к максимальному набору [[stat:em|Мастерства стихий]] для увеличения бонуса и [[stat:er|Восстановления энергии]] для использования [[ability:burst|Взрыва стихии]] каждую ротацию (который продлевает действие бонуса и наносит неплохой урон за счёт [[element:swirl|Рассеивания]]).

notes.en: The element which is absorbed by [[character:kaedehara-kazuha]]'s [[ability:burst]] follows the priority of [[element:pyro]] > [[element:hydro]] > [[element:electro]] > [[element:cryo]], and can be absorbed from both the active character and enemies. (i.e. Standing in [[character:bennett]]'s [[ability:burst]] will result in [[character:kaedehara-kazuha]]'s [[ability:burst]] infusing [[element:pyro]] as [[character:bennett]]'s [[ability:burst]] applies [[element:pyro]] to the active character).
notes.fr: L'élément absorbé par l'[[ability:burst]] de [[character:kaedehara-kazuha]] suit la priorité [[element:pyro]] > [[element:hydro]] > [[element:electro]] > [[element:cryo]], et peut être absorbé à la fois depuis le personnage actif et les ennemis. (c.-à-d. se tenir dans l'[[ability:burst]] de [[character:bennett]] fera que l'[[ability:burst]] de [[character:kaedehara-kazuha]] s'infusera en [[element:pyro]], puisque l'[[ability:burst]] de [[character:bennett]] applique [[element:pyro]] au personnage actif).
notes.it: L'assorbimento di un elemento dal [[ability:burst]] di [[character:kaedehara-kazuha]] segue la priorità [[element:pyro]] > [[element:hydro]] > [[element:electro]] > [[element:cryo]], e può essere assorbito sia dal personaggio attivo che dai nemici. Ad esempio, essere posizionato all'interno del [[ability:burst]] di [[character:bennett]] permette al [[ability:burst]] di [[character:kaedehara-kazuha]] di infondersi di [[element:pyro]], poiché il [[ability:burst]] di [[character:bennett]] applica [[element:pyro]] al personaggio attivo.
notes.ru: Приоритет поглощения [[ability:burst|Взрывом стихии]] [[character:kaedehara-kazuha|Кадзухи]]: [[element:pyro]] > [[element:hydro]] > [[element:electro]] > [[element:cryo]], элемент может быть захвачен как от активного персонажа, так и от противника (т.е. нахождение персонажа в зоне [[ability:burst|Взрыва стихии]] [[character:bennett|Беннета]] приведет к захвату [[element:pyro]] [[ability:burst|Взрывом стихии]] [[character:kaedehara-kazuha|Кадзухи]], так как первый накладывает [[element:pyro]] статус на активного персонажа).
